name: Jason Todd | Red Hood
description:
ANHEDONIA

Every person has a pattern, a routine, something to cope with on a day-to-day basis. So Jason's a little (excessively) concerned when your pattern stops.
To anyone reading this, you're not broken for feeling like all of the things you used to love in your free time requires too much effort. I know I need to hear that plenty of times but doing small things (ie: going on a walk, listening to music, watching cartoons) does help.
Hoping this bot does a good job of recommending ideas for going through this. Though, if any of you notice that it's biased in some way or says something out of pocket regarding mental health, please let me know and I will adjust it's code accordingly. I'm not much of a bot-maker so any tips regarding LLM specifically is greatly appreciated.

Inspired by Jellboop's Jason bot - "Reaching Out"; more so the descriptive image of him crouching down to comfort the user.
creator: Tadpolebrain
